context.description: Implement paid automated mailing via Lob API. Users who purchased a mailing credit can dispatch dispute letters to credit bureaus via physical mail. Includes address collection UI, mailing dispatch backend, and dispute status tracking in the wizard flow.
acceptance_criteria: backend/services/lob_service.py implements: send_dispute_letter(user_id, letter_pdf_bytes, bureau_address, from_address) -> {lob_letter_id, tracking_number, expected_delivery_date}, get_letter_status(lob_letter_id) -> {status, tracking}
backend/api/v1/routes/mailing.py implements: POST /dispatch (authenticated, payment verified, dispatches via Lob, records in disputes/notification_log), GET /{dispute_id}/status (tracking status)

Frontend: DisputeWizardPage.tsx adds Step 4 'Mail Your Letters' after letter generation - shows bureau addresses pre-filled, user confirms own address (collected and stored in profiles), 'Send Letters ($X each)' button (disabled if no payment)
Address collection: User profile includes from_address fields - if not set, wizard shows address form before mailing step
Bureau addresses hardcoded: Experian PO Box 4500 Allen TX 75013, Equifax PO Box 740256 Atlanta GA 30374, TransUnion PO Box 2000 Chester PA 19016
Lob dispatch: Creates letter via Lob API, records lob_letter_id in disputes table, writes notification_log entry (type='mailing_dispatched')
Payment gate: /mailing/dispatch verifies user has unused payment credit before calling Lob API
Lob delivery webhook: POST /api/v1/mailing/lob-webhook receives Lob event callbacks (letter_delivered, letter_returned), updates disputes.tracking_status, writes notification_log entry
Full payment+mailing flow (checkout to Lob dispatch confirmation) completes in <2 minutes end-to-end
Verify with: Lob test mode letter appears in Lob dashboard after dispatch; webhook test event updates dispute tracking_status
implementation_approach: Step 1: Read supabase/functions/generate-dispute-letter/index.ts to understand letter PDF generation
Step 2: Read frontend/src/pages/DisputeWizardPage.tsx to map wizard steps and add Step 4
Step 3: Create backend/services/lob_service.py with lob-python client using settings.LOB_API_KEY
Step 4: Create backend/api/v1/routes/mailing.py with /dispatch and /{id}/status endpoints
Step 5: Add address fields to profiles table (if not already in IMPL-001 migration)
Step 6: Add Step 4 'Mail Letters' to frontend DisputeWizardPage.tsx
Step 7: Create frontend address collection form component
Step 8: Integrate payment credit check using subscriptions/payments API
pre_analysis: Read frontend/src/components/disputes/ - existing dispute components to extend
